news.title: STAT+: U.K. advocacy groups threaten court action over a key provision in the pharma trade deal with the U.S.
news.summary: A pair of advocacy groups is threatening legal action unless the U.K. government revokes regulations at the heart of a new pharma trade agreement with the U.S.

news.title: In Ebola outbreak, a number of Americans in the Congo believed to have had exposure to suspected cases
news.summary: A number of Americans who are in the Congo are believed to have had exposure to suspected cases in the country’s latest Ebola outbreak, sources have told STAT.

news.title: When should you get a mammogram? Conflicting advice makes it hard to know
news.summary: When should you get a mammogram? Conflicting advice makes it hard to know.

news.title: STAT+: The hantavirus outbreak is prompting Covid flashbacks — including the conspiracies
news.summary: The deadly outbreak of a rare strain of hantavirus on a cruise has generated echoes of the pandemic era, including conspiracy theories.

news.title: STAT+: Sen. Bill Cassidy loses primary as race heads to run-off in win for Trump
news.summary: Key health lawmaker Sen. Bill Cassidy will lose his seat, as Louisiana’s Senate primary heads for a runoff between state treasurer John Fleming and Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow.

news.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak an international public health emergency
news.summary: The WHO said an Ebola outbreak first seen in the Democratic Republic of the Congo was an international public health emergency, underscoring the world's concerns.

news.title: Trump blasts ‘disloyal’ Sen. Cassidy while pushing challenger in Louisiana Republican primary
news.summary: Bill Cassidy, leader of the Senate committee that oversees health policy, is fighting for his political life in Louisiana's Republican primary on Saturday.

news.title: Opinion: Marty Makary misunderstood something fundamental about the FDA
news.summary: “The norm-shattering masks a more fundamental misunderstanding of how administrative power can bring about lasting change,” writes Joshua Sharfstein.

news.title: Opinion: The cloudy truth about ‘blue zones’
news.summary: “There's been interest in longevity, promoting it, for millennia. But this 25-year campaign really brought it to the forefront,” Eric Topol says of blue zones.

news.title: CMS pulls back limits on non-standard ACA plans in final rule
news.summary: The Trump administration has finalized annual regulations governing the Affordable Care Act's exchanges, including a plan that would pull back limits on non-standardized plan options offered by insurers.

news.title: Supply costs, payer challenges drag CommonSpirit Health to -5.8% operating margin in fiscal Q3
news.summary: Operating performance at the 137-hospital nonprofit system took a dive even before the recorded impact of a multi-billion-dollar decoupling from Tenet's revenue cycle business.

news.title: Texas Children's Hospital agrees to launch nation's first 'detransition clinic' to settle state, DOJ investigation
news.summary: The large pediatric provider had been under investigation by Texas' attorney general for three years over its gender-affirming care services. It said it agreed to the deal "to protect our resources from endless and costly litigation."

news.title: Kinderhook finalizes acquisition of home health and hospice provider Enhabit
news.summary: Kinderhook Industries finalized its previously announced take-private buyout of Enhabit, a provider of home health and hospice care.

news.title: Docs remain skeptical of insurers' pledge to ease prior auth: AMA survey
news.summary: As payers tout progress made under a pledge to ease burdens around prior authorizations, physicians remain skeptical, a new survey shows.

news.title: Op-ed: Making America healthy again requires more than a committee
news.summary: The question for the administration's soon-to-convene Federal Advisory Committee to improve U.S. healthcare is not whether we know what to do, but whether we are finally willing to do it, write the CEOs of the American Academy of Family Physicians and SCAN Group.

news.title: Epic grows EHR footprint among small health systems even as overall market sales decline in 2025
news.summary: The number of hospitals impacted by EHR purchase decisions dropped 40% compared to 2024, KLAS Research reported. Despite the slowdown, Epic's share of the U.S. EHR market continued to inch up, primarily driven by contract decisions at smaller health systems.

news.title: SCOTUS temporarily restores telehealth access to abortion pill mifepristone
news.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court has issued an emergency order, temporarily blocking a federal appeals court ruling in Louisiana which would have prevented the abortion pill mifepristone from being prescribed over the phone and sent through the mail in the United States.

news.title: Washington AG alleges Providence failed to accommodate pregnant, nursing employees
news.summary: A lawsuit brought this week by the state alleges the nonprofit system "regularly" refused, delayed or failed to implement accommodations for pregnant and nursing employees as required by law, and that some of those employees "experienced retaliation" following their requests.

news.title: Health Tech Weekly Rundown: Headspace app launches on Apple Watch; Visby, RAINN partner on safe access program
news.summary: Stay up to date on the latest in health tech, digital health and health AI news with this weekly brief.

news.title: Chutes & Ladders—Alignment Healthcare shuffles leadership team; Highmark hires former Optum CEO
news.summary: Welcome to this week's Chutes & Ladders, our roundup of hirings, firings and retirings throughout the industry. Please submit the good news—or the bad—from your shop, and we will feature it here at the end of each week.

news.title: Epic, Oracle and Cleveland Clinic among companies to joining CMS prior authorization initiative
news.summary: A slew of additional "early adopters" from different corners of the industry said they will tackle the workflow, technical and operational barriers that have stymied adoption of electronic prior authorization, CMS said this week.

news.title: Executing biomarker-driven oncology trials
news.summary: Why biomarker-driven oncology trials require new thinking across patient recruitment, assay development and regulatory strategy.

news.title: Transforming neurodegenerative disease treatment
news.summary: Discover how Cognition Therapeutics is redefining hope for Alzheimer’s and Dementia with Lewy bodies [JG1] with innovative, accessible therapies.

news.title: Using Digital Technologies to Enhance Patient Experience and Better Manage Supply Chain
news.summary: Integrating connectivity into drug delivery devices as a way to improve patient engagement and adherence

news.title: Ensuring Sustainability Throughout Drug and Device Development
news.summary: How the biopharma and drug delivery industries actively move to embed sustainability into core principles, products and processes

news.title: Utilizing AI to Facilitate Combination Product Development
news.summary: Specific examples of AI/ML usage by pharma companies through the combination product development process

news.title: Achieving Effective Manufacturing Scaleup for Clinical and Commercial Success
news.summary: Effective partnering between pharma and manufacturing as well as growing pains and lessons learned in scaling

news.title: Advances and Opportunities in Dual Chamber Injectables
news.summary: In this panel discussion from the 2025 PODD: Partnership Opportunities in Drug Delivery Conference, pharma executives and drug delivery experts discuss progess in the development of liquid/liquid and liquid/lyo dual chamber systems.

news.title: What a Strategic Partnership Looks Like in Practice: Inside the Takeda–Basil Collaboration That Delivered Tenfold Enrollment
news.summary: This case study highlights how Basil Clinical Research and Takeda’s first-time partnership became the top global recruiter, exceeding enrollment goals by tenfold through proactive assessments, early collaboration, and inclusive design.

news.title: Eli Lilly on Site Enablement: Co-Designing Solutions with Sites
news.summary: A case study highlighting how Eli Lilly partnered with clinical sites to co-design practical, site-centric solutions that enhanced trial execution and operational efficiency.

news.title: Building Trust-Driven Partnerships: AstraZeneca’s Concierge Approach to Accelerating Site Activation and Enrollment
news.summary: AstraZeneca’s approach to collaboration has enabled faster site activation, stronger recruitment performance, and improved data delivery.

news.title: Bridging Access Gaps: Sponsor-Led Enablement of Research-Naïve Sites to Expand Patient Reach
news.summary: This case study shares how Endo enabled a new site through hands-on mentorship, infrastructure support, and trust-building.

news.title: UPDATED: After Makary departure, CDER chief Tracy Beth Høeg headed out at FDA
news.summary: With the ink barely dry on outgoing commissioner Marty Makary’s resignation, another top regulator is heading for the exit at the FDA.

papers.title: DiagnosticIQ: A Benchmark for LLM-Based Industrial Maintenance Action Recommendation from Symbolic Rules
papers.summary: Monitoring complex industrial assets relies on engineer-authored symbolic rules that trigger based on sensor conditions and prompt technicians to perform corrective actions. The bottleneck is not detection but response: translating rules into maintenance steps requires asset-specific knowledge gained through years of practice. We investigate whether LLMs can serve as decision support for this rule-to-action step and introduce , a benchmark of 6{,}690 expert-validated multiple-choice questions from 118 rule-action pairs across 16 asset types. We contribute (i) a symbolic-to-MCQA pipeline normal
